observed_absence: coverage_source does not directly supply TerminalComposite(C,T)
restricted_closure_surface does not directly supply TerminalComposite(C,T)
bridge_source_target_role: names the missing bounded source needed before any TerminalComposite(C,T) row witness can be supplied

required_bridge_source_shape.input: coverage_source plus restricted_closure_surface plus restricted_zero_day_instance_only scope
required_bridge_source_shape.output: source data sufficient to supply TerminalComposite(C,T)

positive_claim: records the missing bounded bridge-source target for the TerminalComposite(C,T) row
missing_object: actual bounded bridge-source evidence sufficient for TerminalComposite(C,T)
non_claims: does not construct the restricted edge
does not construct the source-field bridge
does not construct the TerminalComposite(C,T) row witness
does not prove field-by-field obligation discharge
does not erase the restricted boundary
does not prove the restricted-to-unrestricted lift
does not add SNOLAB or external empirical evidence
next_weakest_point: Supply bounded bridge-source evidence for TerminalComposite(C,T), or keep the first row witness absent.
